title: Field generators
wikitext:
[]: Field generators? [some spoilers]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 18, 2009 9:30 am I noticed an interesting (i think) little detail: Whenever something is quarantined for some reason, there are always these funky pillars present: 1. In the "prison" of the Third Angel [url]http://img212.imageshack.us/img212/7877/pylons.png[/url] 2. When Asuka is held on life support/decontamination after the Bardiel debacle: 3. And in the jikai for 3.0, when Eva-01 is shown as being sealed (there are pillars around): These pillars always seem to be associted with Angels/angelic contamination and such. Any thoughts on what might they be? Some sort of containment field generators? This is probably not the most thread-worthy subject, but maybe someone more savvy than myself can spot some religious reference, or an obscure sci-fi/anime nod? EDIT: For some reason, ImageShack is acting up with the resized version of the first image. 


[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:02 am I think your on the money with them being to suppress or contain angelic activity. I think this will definatly be something that will probably be explained in more detail in the next film. During her battle with the bone angel thing, Mari was commenting about something to do with her Sync ratio during the battle when she got close to those pillars so maybe there will be more information available on these pillars once the translation is fully complete. I might be wrong on the sync ratio part as I'm not in anyway familiar with Japanese apart from what Ive picked up on watching anime before.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:07 am This also might have something to do with the rods that come out of Eva-02.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:12 am Possibility of of a new type of AT field?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:28 am "Sweet Jesus It's an Anti AT Field."

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:56 am This also might have something to do with the rods that come out of Eva-02.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:04 pm Ornette wrote: This also might have something to do with the rods that come out of Eva-02.

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:09 pm That would make sense, since the Beast mode seems to be a sort of limited berserk mode, and the pylons are seem to be set up to suppress Angelic activity. So, in the case of the Beast mode, they could serve as a countermeasure against the Eva starting to get "too" berserk. Keep it under control, but let the "Beast" out a little.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:39 pm The syringe part is a bit misleading. There's a cap and a thin rod that comes out first, then the large rod comes out until it hits the cap. Kind of like a hydraulic piston. I don't think they're actually syringed.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:54 pm They're the Eva version of N-Jammers. In this case, AT-Jammers. Rebuild 4.0 will inevitably introduce an Evangelion armed with AT-Jammer Cancelers. And it will be piloted by the Sixth Child, Souichiro Hoshi.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Jul 18, 2009 3:55 pm I doubt that it would be an AT jammer, in the original NGE the Geofront was supposed to hold the ability to neutralize AT fields (likely due to the presence of the black moon) and when Zureu came in they said it had an effect but very very little. If the effect were the same in ROE then along with Unit 02s jammers, it should have taken care of that last AT field. As for the Anti AT field theory I doubt that as well because the Anti AT fields that were used before turn everybody into orange juice and I didn't see nobody turning into no Tropicana.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sat Jul 18, 2009 7:08 pm What about that syringe that surounded the nervous system in "Nebuchadnezzer's Key"? It looks like the same thing to me, they'd need it to surpress it's growth. It's cool that we can cross reference things like this just like in the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Jul 28, 2009 4:37 am Late reply. The "syringe" doesn't seems similar to me, but there are some "pillar-like" applications at the sides of the key. Circled with red on the image below: But i guess the bakelit (or whatever it is this time around) it is encased in is enough to suppress any possible growth. 


[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 28, 2009 7:29 am wonderluster wrote: in the original NGE the Geofront was supposed to hold the ability to neutralize AT fields
